plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's a summary of the plan — 6 files, no new dependencies, no build config changes:

---

## What the Plan Does

**Core idea**: Layer a named-theme palette system on top of the existing `.dark` class mechanism. The existing `useTheme` hook's public API stays intact (backward compat for `DiffWorkerPoolProvider` and the settings page), and new `appThemeId` / `setAppTheme` are added alongside it.

---

## The 6 Files

### New files
1. **`packages/shared/src/theme.ts`** — Pure TS types (`AppThemeId`, `AppThemeColors`, `AppTheme`) + a typed `APP_THEMES_BY_ID: Record<AppThemeId, AppTheme>` with all three palettes. No imports, no dependencies. Uses a `Record` (not an array) to satisfy `noUncheckedIndexedAccess`.

2. **`apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx`** — 3-column grid of theme cards. Each card shows a split color swatch (background + sidebar strip + accent strip) and the theme name, with an "On" badge for the active selection. Imports directly from `@t3tools/shared/theme`.

### Edited files
3. **`packages/shared/package.json`** — Add `"./theme"` to the subpath exports map (same pattern as `"./model"`, `"./git"`, etc.).

4. **`apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts`** — Extend with `getStoredAppTheme`, `applyAppTheme` (sets `data-theme` attribute + syncs `.dark` class), an extended `ThemeSnapshot`, new `setAppTheme` function, and `resolvedTheme` now derived from `APP_THEMES_BY_ID[appThemeId].isDark` instead of the old `snapshot.theme`.

5. **`apps/web/src/index.css`** — Add four new default CSS vars (`--sidebar-bg`, `--editor-bg`, `--terminal-bg`, `--status-bar-bg`) to `:root`, then three `[data-theme="..."]` attribute-selector blocks that override `--background`, `--foreground`, `--primary`, `--ring`, and the four new vars. Attribute selectors have higher specificity than `:root:is(.dark, ...)` so they win cleanly without `!important`.

6. **`apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx`** — Remove the old `THEME_OPTIONS` radio group and replace with `<ThemeSelector />`.
